name: Contact Form
description: Adds a /contact page with an email contact form.
author: Core 3 CMS

settings.label: Recipient Email
settings.hint: Contact form submissions will be sent to this email. Leave blank to use the site's From Email.

settings.label: Success Message
settings.default: Thanks! We'll get back to you soon.
settings.placeholder: Thanks! We'll get back to you soon.
